title: Snake
description: Guide the snake to eat food and grow longer. Don't hit the walls or yourself!

controls.desktop: Arrow keys to move

title: Tetris
description: Stack falling blocks to complete rows. Clear lines before they reach the top!

controls.desktop: ← → to move, ↑ to rotate, ↓ to soft drop, Space to hard drop
controls.mobile: Tap sides to move, tap center to rotate, swipe down to drop

title: Breakout
description: Bounce the ball off your paddle to smash all the bricks. Don't let the ball fall!

controls.desktop: ← → or mouse to move paddle
controls.mobile: Touch and drag to move paddle

title: Frogger
description: Help the frog cross busy roads and rivers to reach safety. Watch out for traffic!

controls.desktop: Arrow keys to hop

title: Asteroids
description: Pilot your ship through an asteroid field. Shoot to survive as space gets crowded!

controls.desktop: ← → to rotate, ↑ to thrust, Space to shoot

description: Slide numbered tiles on a grid to combine them and reach the 2048 tile!

controls.desktop: Arrow keys to slide tiles

title: Minesweeper
description: Uncover tiles without detonating hidden mines. Use number clues to flag the bombs!

controls.desktop: Left-click to reveal, right-click to flag
controls.mobile: Tap to reveal, long-press to flag

title: Sudoku
description: Fill every row, column, and box with the numbers 1–9. A true test of logic!

controls.desktop: Click cell, type number (1-9), Delete to clear

title: Memory Match
description: Flip cards and find matching pairs. Test your memory with increasing grid sizes!

controls.desktop: Click cards to flip

title: Sliding Puzzle
description: Slide the numbered tiles into the correct order. The classic 15-puzzle challenge!

controls.desktop: Click a tile next to the empty space to slide it
controls.mobile: Tap a tile to slide it

title: Solitaire
description: The timeless card game. Stack cards in descending order and suit to win!

controls.desktop: Click and drag cards between piles
controls.mobile: Tap to select, tap destination to move

title: Blackjack
description: Beat the dealer by getting as close to 21 as possible without going over!

controls.desktop: Click Hit, Stand, or Double buttons

title: War
description: A battle of the cards! Flip and compare — the highest card takes the pile.

controls.desktop: Click to flip your card

title: Higher or Lower
description: Guess if the next card will be higher or lower. How long can you keep your streak?

controls.desktop: Click Higher or Lower buttons

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: The classic X's and O's. Play against a smart AI opponent on a 3×3 grid!

controls.desktop: Click an empty cell to place your mark

title: Connect Four
description: Drop colored discs into the grid and be the first to connect four in a row!

controls.desktop: Click a column to drop your disc
controls.mobile: Tap a column to drop your disc

title: Checkers
description: Jump and capture your opponent's pieces on the diagonal. Get kinged to move backwards!

controls.desktop: Click piece to select, click destination to move

title: Reversi
description: Outflank your opponent to flip their pieces. Control the most squares to win!

controls.desktop: Click an empty cell to place your piece

title: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from waves of descending aliens. Shoot them before they reach you!

controls.desktop: ← → to move, Space to shoot

title: Asteroid Blaster
description: Navigate your ship through an asteroid field and blast everything in your path!

controls.desktop: ← → to rotate, ↑ to thrust, Space to shoot

title: Duck Hunt
description: Shoot the ducks as they fly across the screen before they escape! Quick reflexes needed.

controls.desktop: Click to shoot

title: Galaga
description: Battle alien formations in this classic space shooter. Watch out for diving enemies!

controls.desktop: ← → to move, Space to shoot

title: Pixel Runner
description: Run, jump, and dodge obstacles in this endless runner. How far can you go?

controls.desktop: Space or ↑ to jump

title: Doodle Jump
description: Bounce ever higher on platforms. Avoid enemies and don't fall off the screen!

controls.desktop: ← → to move
controls.mobile: Tilt or tap sides to move

title: Cave Dash
description: Navigate through a treacherous cave system. Dodge stalactites and collect gems!

controls.desktop: Space or click to fly up, release to descend

title: Robot Escape
description: Guide your robot through dangerous levels. Jump, shoot, and find the exit key!

controls.desktop: ← → to move, ↑ to jump, Space to shoot

title: Wordle
description: Guess the five-letter word in six tries. Green, yellow, and gray clues guide you!

controls.desktop: Type letters, Enter to submit, Backspace to delete

title: Hangman
description: Guess the hidden word one letter at a time. Too many wrong guesses and it's game over!

controls.desktop: Press letter keys or click the on-screen keyboard

title: Typing Speed
description: Type the displayed text as fast and accurately as you can. Track your WPM!

controls.desktop: Type the displayed text

title: Word Search
description: Find all the hidden words in the letter grid. They can go in any direction!

controls.desktop: Click and drag to select words
controls.mobile: Touch and drag to select words

title: Cookie Clicker
description: Click the cookie, buy upgrades, and automate your cookie empire! How many can you bake?

controls.desktop: Click the cookie, click upgrades to buy

title: Whack-a-Mole
description: Smash the moles as they pop up from their holes! Watch for the golden mole bonus!

controls.desktop: Click moles to whack them

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to flap through the gaps between pipes. Deceptively simple, maddeningly addictive!

controls.desktop: Space or click to flap
